query:
update bookings
               set check_in        = $2,
                   check_out       = $3,
                   note            = $4,
                   discount_type   = $5,
                   discount_value  = $6,
                   payment_status  = $7,
                   paid_at         = case when $7 = 'paid' then coalesce(paid_at, now()) else null end,
                   payment_method  = $8,
                   deposit_amount  = $9,
                   customer_name   = $10,
                   customer_phone  = $11,
                   customer_id_type    = $12,
                   customer_id_number  = $13,
                   updated_by      = $14,
                   updated_at      = now()
               where id = $1
